response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or secure systems, with most recent roles focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015, there is no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-based industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse tech stacks.
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops.
Demonstrated ability to build scalable, event-driven systems and CI/CD infrastructure.
concerns: No recent or substantial C++/STL development in the last 9 years; core requirement unmet.
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or industrial protocols.
No demonstrable experience with on-premises/cloud automation platforms or IoT systems in manufacturing.
